title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 5–8, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I'll just steal it from you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's true that I came back defeated from Grand Line...!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: But even so, I'm still the mighty Don Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That ocean shrouted by darkness, the mention of which alone causes weak men to tremble in their boots...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I had enough power to conquer that sea! Enough manpower! Enough ambition!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The only thing I lacked was information!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was my only flaw!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I simply did not know enough...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Which is why I'll steal your travel log and this ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like hell we'll let you! If we lose this ship, we've got nowhere to go!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's right! All the cooks here were chased out by other restaurants before finally finding their home in this place!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Owner Zeff is the only one who accepted us as chefs! He's our Saviour!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: We ain't letting you pirates steal our home away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: silence! The difference in strength between you and I is clear as night and day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I even proved it to you just now! Don't you dare forget that I'm the strongest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once I obtain Zeff's travel log, I'll reassemble my pirate fleet,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and find one piece to become the greatest pirate of this era!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it right there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The one who'll become pirate King is me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-What did that errand boy say just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, stand back down kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or you'll be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not standing down,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Especially on this point!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Did you say something, little brat?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: I'll be nice enough to let your comment just now slide...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's fine, you don't have to let it slide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I was only stating the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This ain't a game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did you hear that just now? Even KrieG couldn't make it in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't say anything bad so let's just give up on going to a place like that!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
